description: CI runner moved from CircleCI to GitHub Actions while release gates stayed active. (current)
query: What is the current CI runner?

entries.content: Previous CI runner was CircleCI during the beta release. The first CI setup used CircleCI parallel jobs.
CI migration completed. Current CI runner changed to GitHub Actions and CircleCI is no longer used for merges.
Right after the GitHub Actions migration, the team confirmed release smoke tests and branch protection checks.
Latest CI status: GitHub Actions is still the active runner, with required release gates on main.

evaluation.anchor_hint: current status must prefer the May status over the January beta entry

description: Primary database migrated from MySQL to PostgreSQL and the fallback was later retired. (current)
query: What is the current primary database?

entries.content: Previous database engine was MySQL. The first production database used MySQL with nightly backups.
Before the PostgreSQL cutover, the team froze writes and verified a full MySQL backup.
Right after the migration, row-count checks and checksum validation passed on PostgreSQL.
Latest database status: PostgreSQL is the current primary database, and the MySQL fallback is no longer retained.

evaluation.anchor_hint: current database is in the latest status entry

description: Public API moved through v1, v2, and v3 while older versions were invalidated. (current)
query: What is the current public API version?

entries.content: The first public API version was API v1. Previous clients still used v1 at launch.
API v2 became current after adding pagination and idempotency keys.
Right after API v3 beta opened, partners validated webhook signatures and retry headers.
Latest API status: API v3 is current, API v2 is previous, and API v1 is no longer supported.

evaluation.anchor_hint: current version should prefer latest status

description: Authentication moved from password login to magic links and then passkeys. (current)
query: What is the current admin authentication method?

entries.content: The first authentication method was password login with email OTP. Password login was the previous default.
Magic links became the current default after support tickets showed password resets were too frequent.
Right after passkey beta started, the security team verified device-bound recovery and audit logging.
Latest auth status: passkeys are current for admins, magic links are previous, and password login is no longer accepted.

evaluation.anchor_hint: current admin auth should use the latest status

description: Monitoring moved from Nagios to Prometheus and then Grafana Cloud. (current)
query: What is the current observability stack?

entries.content: The first monitoring stack was Nagios. Nagios was the previous alert source for uptime checks.
Prometheus became current after service metrics were instrumented and alert rules were migrated.
Right after Grafana Cloud onboarding, the ops team validated burn-rate alerts and dashboard folders.
Latest observability status: Grafana Cloud is current, Prometheus is previous, and Nagios is no longer paging engineers.

evaluation.anchor_hint: current observability should use latest status

description: Monitoring moved from Nagios to Prometheus and then Grafana Cloud. (以前)
query: 以前の observability stack は何でしたか？

entries.content: The first monitoring stack was Nagios. Nagios was the previous alert source for uptime checks.
Prometheus became current after service metrics were instrumented and alert rules were migrated.
Right after Grafana Cloud onboarding, the ops team validated burn-rate alerts and dashboard folders.
Latest observability status: Grafana Cloud is current, Prometheus is previous, and Nagios is no longer paging engineers.

evaluation.anchor_hint: Japanese previous query should identify immediate predecessor

description: Search moved from SQLite FTS-only to hybrid BM25 plus vector retrieval. (current)
query: What is the current search retrieval mode?

entries.content: The first search index was SQLite FTS-only. Previous recall tests relied only on lexical matching.
BM25 became current after token normalization fixed kebab-case and path segment queries.
Right after vector retrieval was added, the team validated bilingual recall and developer-workflow queries.
Latest search status: hybrid BM25 plus vector retrieval is current, BM25-only is previous, and FTS-only is no longer sufficient.

evaluation.anchor_hint: current retrieval should prefer the latest hybrid status
